entity.summary: Decentralized exchange operating across Fantom and Sonic with Solidly-style liquidity pools, token swaps, gauges, voting incentives, concentrated-liquidity infrastructure, and deployed routing contracts.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Equalizer as a decentralized exchange with liquidity pools, trading, gauges, voting incentives, and Fantom-to-Sonic migration support. It publishes current Sonic factory, v2/v3 router, concentrated-liquidity, quoter, and position-management contracts. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, legal entity, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: Equalizer documentation overview
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Equalizer as a Solidly-style decentralized exchange with liquidity pools, trading, fee generation, liquidity incentives, gauges, voting, and Fantom and Sonic deployments.

evidence.title: Equalizer Sonic deployed contracts
evidence.notes: First-party contract registry lists current Sonic factories, v2 and v3 routers, voter and minter contracts, concentrated-liquidity factories, quoters, position managers, and swap routers, supporting active protocol status.
